items.title: Solana at a breaking point: $100 mln inflows meet rising sell pressure
items.whyYouShouldCare: Solana faces a critical moment as significant inflows are countered by increased selling pressure, impacting its liquidity and market stability.

items.title: Hyperliquid's HYPE token jumps 5% as Iran war brings windfall revenue, JUP gains on supply freeze
items.whyYouShouldCare: Hyperliquid's HYPE token's rise indicates a potential shift in investor sentiment, which could influence trading dynamics within the Solana ecosystem.

items.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Solana ETFs record weekly inflows amid price weakness
items.whyYouShouldCare: The inflows into Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Solana ETFs suggest sustained interest in these assets, which may enhance Solana's market positioning despite current price challenges.
